app.title: QKB
app.footer: QKB · Phase 1 · static SPA · runs from file://

index.heading: Qualified Key Binding
index.subheading: Bind a secp256k1 key to your qualified electronic identity.

binding.size: Binding statement is larger than the protocol limit.
binding.field: Binding contains an invalid field value.
binding.jcs: Binding could not be canonicalized as JCS.

cades.parse: The detached signature could not be parsed.

qes.sigInvalid: The qualified electronic signature is not valid.
qes.digestMismatch: The signed digest does not match the binding.
qes.certExpired: The signing certificate is not valid for the binding timestamp.
qes.unknownCA: The signing authority is not in the EU trusted list.
qes.wrongAlgorithm: The signature algorithm is not supported in this version.

witness.offsetNotFound: Could not locate a required field inside the binding.
witness.fieldTooLong: A field in the binding exceeds the circuit length limit.

prover.wasmOOM: The in-browser prover ran out of memory.
prover.artifactMismatch: Downloaded circuit artifact does not match the expected hash.

bundle.malformed: The QKB bundle file is malformed.

registry.rootMismatch: The trusted-list root does not match the registry on-chain.
registry.alreadyBound: This key is already bound on-chain.
registry.ageExceeded: The binding timestamp is too old to register.
